index.about_p1: AntWorld.org is dedicated to making ant identification accessible to researchers, students, and enthusiasts. Our interactive dichotomous keys guide you through morphological features to identify ant species found across all ecoregions worldwide.
index.about_p2: All data is freely available for scientific and educational purposes under Creative Commons license.

resources.antweb_desc: World's largest online database of ant images, specimen records, and natural history information.
resources.antwiki_desc: Comprehensive wiki resource for ant taxonomy, biology, and natural history information.
resources.globalants_desc: Comprehensive ant trait data at a global scale for research and conservation.
resources.antscan_desc: High-resolution 3D micro-CT scans revealing ant internal and external anatomy. Open access to 792 species.
resources.antcat_desc: The authoritative online catalog of ant names, synonymies, and taxonomic history.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.not_share: Share any data to third parties for advertisement purposes,
privacy.not_track: Track your movements outside the website,
privacy.not_cookies: Use cookies or store any information on your computer that is not necessary for the good functioning of the website
privacy.do_clicks: Number of clicks of a designated IP address on the website, but not on what content,
privacy.do_time: Approximate time spend by an IP address on the website at a given day,
privacy.do_origin: Look for the provenance of inbound IP addresses and links,
privacy.do_cache: Store code in your cache that allow an appropriate rendering of the website like the header or the css, thus improving the loading speed of the pages
privacy.contact_us: We hope this summary has answered all of your questions, if not we are here to answer any question you may have:

credits.role_desc: Building the site, design html5 and css3, coding in javascript and php and all that uninteresting stuff...
credits.seeking_translators: Translators in the following languages: russian, japanese, chinese. Interested?
credits.image_credits_intro: Ant specimen photographs throughout this website come from several sources. Each image links to its original source.
credits.antweb_desc: the world's largest online database of ant images and specimen records.
credits.antweb_photographers: Photographers include: April Nobile, Will Ericson, Erin Prado, Shannon Hartman, and many other contributors at the California Academy of Sciences.
credits.jad_desc: High-quality specimen photographs and drawings of Japanese ant species.
